observation.zh: GET /v1/tasks 新增 archived 状态
priority 从 string 变 enum，类型校验受影响
observation.en: priority changes from string to enum and affects type validation

observation.zh: 429 新增 retry_after_ms，重试逻辑可优化
observation.en: 429 adds retry_after_ms and retry logic can improve

observation.zh: 发现 3 个直接调用、2 个测试断言、1 篇文档
observation.en: Found three direct calls, two test assertions, and one doc page

zh: 人工确认版本号、环境、上线窗口和回退方式。
en: Manually confirm version, environment, release window, and rollback method.

zh: 没有 owner 的调用点不能直接关闭。
字段兼容策略需要产品和后端共同确认。
影响分析完成不等于代码已经修改。
en: Call sites without owners cannot be closed.
The compatibility policy needs product and backend confirmation.
Impact analysis completion does not mean code has been changed.

trigger.zh: 接口字段即将调整，需要判断页面、测试、文档和调用方会受哪些影响。
trigger.en: An API field change was planned, requiring impact analysis across pages, tests, docs, and callers.

firstSignal.zh: 字段名变化影响了 5 个调用点，其中 2 个在测试里。
firstSignal.en: The field rename affected five call sites, two of them in tests.

doneSignal.zh: 影响表列出 owner、文件路径、修改建议和验证命令。
doneSignal.en: The impact table listed owner, file path, change suggestion, and verification command.
